axioms.name: Trigger necessity
axioms.statement: Authority editing is not spontaneous; it requires a trigger tau.

axioms.name: Budget reality
axioms.statement: Without an update budget, editability is structurally impossible.

axioms.name: Rollback handle
axioms.statement: If rollback handles rho are fully pruned, authority becomes non-editable by construction.

axioms.name: Separation
axioms.statement: Identity collapse I ≡ A is the shortest path to closure.

axioms.name: Maintenance
axioms.statement: Periodic maintenance prevents runaway authority debt D_A.
